title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates a five-step methodology for using Claude Code to build a revenue-generating product without prior coding experience. The approach emphasizes problem clarity, engineering trade-offs, vocabulary acquisition, deliberate incremental development, and preemptive failure planning.
